concerns.sentence: Other findings include intestinal obstruction [E:cond:2], ascites [E:cond:9], paralytic ileus [E:cond:11], tachycardia [E:note:row328226:6], and iatrogenic hypotension [E:cond:13].
concerns.reason: The summary lists tachycardia as a finding, but the fact sheet lists it as a vital sign (heart rate 120s-130s).
